title: Rule (GSM v1)
description: Behavioral logical atom: event-triggered program whose body is the single source of truth for imperative governance logic. First imperative level in the PPR chain.

body.description: Source code in the declared language, conforming to the SIE Rule API contract for that language binding. Must begin with an on("EventArchetypeName") call as its first executable statement.

language.description: Language binding for the Rule body. The Definition Manager dispatches to the language-specific parser for validation and auto-derivation. Supported values are defined by available SIE Rule API language bindings.

x-sie-api.description: Language-neutral SIE Rule API contract that all language bindings implement.

triggeringEventArchetype.description: Derived at save/parse time from the on() call argument in body. Not stored as user input.

operationalizingPolicies.description: Derived from Operationalization chains: SELECT DISTINCT o.policy FROM operationalization o WHERE o.rule = THIS.

scopingFunctions.description: Derived from Realization chains: SELECT DISTINCT r.function FROM realization r WHERE r.rule = THIS.
